email_subject: Application for Office Manager - Antwerpen centrum - Pharma
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Office Manager position at your pharmaceutical company in Antwerp, as advertised via Michael Page International. With a background in digital marketing and web development, I bring strong organizational, administrative, and technical skills that align well with the role's requirements.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple projects simultaneously, coordinate with teams, and ensure timely delivery of tasks. I am proficient in MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, and have experience with IT onboarding and support. My previous experience in logistics at Katoen Natie has honed my accuracy and efficiency in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am comfortable in an international, dynamic setting.

I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my skills can contribute to your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Office Manager position at your pharmaceutical company in Antwerp, as advertised via Michael Page International. With a strong foundation in administration, digital tools, and team coordination, I am confident I can contribute to the smooth daily operations of your office.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects, coordinate content workflows, and ensure deadlines are met. This role has sharpened my organizational skills and ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment. I am proficient in MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, and have experience with IT onboarding and support—skills directly relevant to the office manager role.

My background also includes logistics at Katoen Natie, where I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume setting, and front-end development at ViviDoctor, where I collaborated with cross-functional teams. These experiences have given me a polyvalent skill set and a service-oriented mindset.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively taking classes to improve. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, I am ready to work on-site in Berchem. I am structured, proactive, and comfortable in an international environment.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience aligns with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proficient in MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, and digital tools for office management
Experienced in coordinating multiple projects and supporting teams in a fast-paced environment
Strong organizational and administrative skills from logistics and digital marketing roles
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving
Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, with immediate availability for on-site work
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, now seeking to leverage strong organizational and administrative skills in an Office Manager role. At Episto, I manage multiple client projects, coordinate content workflows, and ensure timely delivery. I am proficient in MS Office, Teams, SharePoint, and have experience with IT onboarding and support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp, I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and currently taking classes. I am structured, proactive, and service-oriented, comfortable in a dynamic international environment.

## Core Skills
- Office & admin: MS Office (Word, Excel, Outlook), Teams, SharePoint, calendar management, meeting coordination, travel booking
- IT support: onboarding/offboarding, basic troubleshooting, software setup
- Communication: professional written and verbal in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 (in progress)
- Organization: multitasking, prioritization, accuracy, deadline-driven
- Digital tools: Google Workspace, Canva, social media platforms
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage multiple client projects simultaneously, coordinating content creation, reviews, and publishing schedules
- Support team communication and task tracking using digital tools
- Assist with IT-related onboarding for new clients and team members
- Maintain organized documentation and files for client accounts

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured proper documentation and inventory management

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver web application features on time
- Maintained clear communication with stakeholders

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Managed full project lifecycle from planning to launch, coordinating with external parties
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations, demonstrating attention to detail

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
